2026-04-26 17:37:00

auto

@lhl

Created by smart-doc

1.商品管理

1.1.查询商品

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

status

int16

审核状态

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

brandId

string

店铺ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=j2byoa&order=gaguzc&name=shan.batz&status=19806&goodsId=59&brandId=59&goodsSn=fn0cap

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "osqsnu",
  "errmsg": "h0haio",
  "data": {}
}

1.2.获取店铺与分类选择列表

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 获取店铺与分类选择列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "syd0qu",
  "errmsg": "3aezlo",
  "data": {}
}

1.3.编辑商品

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

goods

object

商品基本信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

└─goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

└─name

string

商品名称

false

-

└─categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

└─brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

└─gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

└─brief

string

商品简介

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

└─shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

└─address

string

自提地址

false

-

└─isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

└─isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

└─isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

└─isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

└─unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

└─counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

└─retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

└─detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

└─remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

└─status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

└─weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

products

array

货品信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品货品表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specifications

array

商品规格值列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─price

number

商品货品价格

false

-

└─number

int32

商品货品数量

false

-

└─url

string

商品货品图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

grouponRules

object

团购规则

false

-

└─id

string

团购规则表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

└─discount

number

优惠金额

false

-

└─discountMember

int32

团购人数

false

-

└─expireTime

string

团购过期时间

false

-

└─status

int16

团购规则状态，正常上线则0，到期自动下线则1，管理手动下线则2

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

attributes

array

商品参数

false

-

└─id

string

商品参数表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─attribute

string

商品参数名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品参数值

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

specifications

array

商品规格

false

-

└─id

string

商品规格表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specification

string

商品规格名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品规格值

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品规格图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/update --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "59",
    "goodsSn": "plwu7i",
    "name": "shan.batz",
    "categoryId": "59",
    "brandId": "59",
    "gallery": [
      "mbqjdi"
    ],
    "keywords": "eeh0r3",
    "brief": "ibl7n9",
    "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
    "shareUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
    "address": "6789 Nella Landing， South Jen， AK 81526",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "10rxbn",
    "counterPrice": 379,
    "retailPrice": 703,
    "detail": "atbyj1",
    "remarks": "7misfc",
    "status": 21598,
    "weight": 601,
    "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "59",
    "version": 726
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "59",
      "goodsId": "59",
      "specifications": [
        "vrqaw6"
      ],
      "price": 893,
      "number": 123,
      "url": "www.avery-schuster.name",
      "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "59",
      "version": 448
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "59",
    "goodsId": "59",
    "goodsName": "shan.batz",
    "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
    "discount": 332,
    "discountMember": 795,
    "expireTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "status": 23246,
    "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "59",
    "version": 202
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "59",
      "goodsId": "59",
      "attribute": "nq7mdw",
      "value": "06rzgy",
      "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "59",
      "version": 867
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "59",
      "goodsId": "59",
      "specification": "xziv0m",
      "value": "j3ukfq",
      "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
      "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "59",
      "version": 257
    }
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "hl0vne",
  "errmsg": "f3vuvt",
  "data": {}
}

1.4.删除商品

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 删除商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/delete --data 'id=59'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "cw0hkg",
  "errmsg": "9punc2",
  "data": {}
}

1.5.商品上下架

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/on-sale

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 商品上下架

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

brief

string

商品简介

false

-

picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/on-sale --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "goodsSn": "ptzfg8",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "categoryId": "59",
  "brandId": "59",
  "gallery": [
    "u3a96e"
  ],
  "keywords": "4014d5",
  "brief": "xsbxg8",
  "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "shareUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "address": "6789 Nella Landing， South Jen， AK 81526",
  "isGroupon": true,
  "isNew": true,
  "isHot": true,
  "isTakeTheir": true,
  "unit": "nargx8",
  "counterPrice": 617,
  "retailPrice": 450,
  "detail": "6msa3m",
  "remarks": "p8cx0c",
  "status": 9796,
  "weight": 433,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 970
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ezjdr4",
  "errmsg": "8ha7yd",
  "data": {}
}

1.6.添加商品

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

goods

object

商品基本信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

└─goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

└─name

string

商品名称

false

-

└─categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

└─brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

└─gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

└─brief

string

商品简介

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

└─shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

└─address

string

自提地址

false

-

└─isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

└─isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

└─isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

└─isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

└─unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

number

false

-

└─retailPrice

number

false

└─detail

string

false

string

false

-

└─status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

int32

false

false

false

string

false

string

false

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/goods/create --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "59",
    "goodsSn": "7vesjv",
    "name": "shan.batz",
    "categoryId": "59",
    "brandId": "59",
    "gallery": [
      "8qv0g0"
    ],
    "keywords": "rozvya",
    "brief": "pybume",
    "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
    "shareUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
    "address": "6789 Nella Landing， South Jen， AK 81526",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "pzww0t",
    "counterPrice": 398,
    "retailPrice": 409,
    "detail": "6dckxf",
    "remarks": "7omrxx",
    "status": 1463,
    "weight": 625,
    "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "59",
    "version": 421
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "59",
      "goodsId": "59",
      "specifications": [
        "tydfw0"
      ],
      "price": 82,
      "number": 127,
      "url": "www.avery-schuster.name",
      "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "59",
      "version": 384
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "59",
    "goodsId": "59",
    "goodsName": "shan.batz",
    "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
    "discount": 340,
    "discountMember": 471,
    "expireTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "status": 24142,
    "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "59",
    "version": 292
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "59",
      "goodsId": "59",
      "attribute": "z5s542",
      "value": "uae4bm",
      "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "59",
      "version": 211
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "59",
      "goodsId": "59",
      "specification": "t3dzgs",
      "value": "dzrzfj",
      "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
      "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "59",
      "version": 698
    }
  ]
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "24ls40",
  "errmsg": "24sfi0",
  "data": {}
}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

false

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

2.团购管理

2.1.查询参与用户

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/groupon/join

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询参与用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

status

int16

团购状态

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

ruleId

string

团购规则ID

false

-

grouponId

string

团购ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/groupon/join?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=k3nnzm&order=vzcyf9&status=32419&userId=59&ruleId=59&grouponId=59

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

{
  "errno": "alw0jz",
  "errmsg": "0zem65",
  "data": {}
}

3.意见反馈

3.1.查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/feedback/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/feedback/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=lcyjck&order=km08qx&userId=59&username=shan.batz&mobile=520.307.8461

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "0apl78",
  "errmsg": "n7ikpk",
  "data": {}
}

4.品牌管理

4.1.查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/brand/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

id

string

店铺id

false

-

name

string

店铺名称

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/brand/list?page=1&limit=10&sort=hfj7kr&order=pvk6c1&id=59&name=shan.batz

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

id

4.3.添加

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/brand/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/brand/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "depict": "3shoeb",
  "mail": "ohcdhe",
  "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "floorPrice": 996,
  "address": "6789 Nella Landing， South Jen， AK 81526",
  "version": 514
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "w3t23w",
  "errmsg": "1ya92m",
  "data": {}
}

4.4.编辑

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/brand/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/brand/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "userId": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "depict": "0oojhs",
  "mail": "3dtw5v",
  "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "address": "6789 Nella Landing， South Jen， AK 81526",
  "floorPrice": 893,
  "lookCount": 249,
  "likeCount": 988,
  "commentCount": 281,
  "status": 89,
  "weight": 293,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 303
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "7dm72m",
  "errmsg": "o368kr",
  "data": {}
}

string

false

type

string

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

page

int32

int32

false

9.关键词

9.1.查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/keyword/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

url

string

地址

false

-

keyword

string

关键字

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/keyword/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=tytr8g&order=72506f&url=www.avery-schuster.name&keyword=ntwj06

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "tu7st4",
  "errmsg": "nwl52o",
  "data": {}
}

9.3.添加

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/keyword/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

关键字表ID

false

-

keyword

string

关键字

false

-

url

string

关键字的跳转链接

false

-

isHot

boolean

是否是热门关键字

false

-

isDefault

boolean

是否是默认关键字

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/keyword/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "keyword": "5zpsdj",
  "url": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "isHot": true,
  "isDefault": true,
  "weight": 960,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 719
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

any object.

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

false

false

string

false

int16

false

  "username": "shan.batz",
  "nickName": "earlean.larkin",
  "avatar": "1a7gw1",
  "mobile": "520.307.8461",
  "mail": "hbssky",
  "gender": 26734
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/ad/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

name

string

广告名称

false

-

content

string

广告内容

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/ad/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=a6mtty&order=crmixj&name=shan.batz&content=yc1td0

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

  "errno": "zrek3s",
  "errmsg": "erbppu",
  "data": {}
}

13.2.添加

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/ad/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

广告表ID

false

-

name

string

广告标题

false

-

link

string

所广告的商品页面或者活动页面链接地址

false

-

url

string

广告宣传图片

false

-

position

int8

广告位置：1则是首页

false

-

content

string

活动内容

false

-

startTime

string

广告开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

广告结束时间

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启动

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/ad/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "link": "1air7s",
  "url": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "position": 13,
  "content": "f0i5du",
  "startTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "endTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "enabled": true,
  "weight": 826,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 819
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{

  "errmsg": "0vkpqf",
  "data": {}
}

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

13.4.编辑

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/ad/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

广告表ID

false

-

name

string

广告标题

false

-

link

string

所广告的商品页面或者活动页面链接地址

false

-

url

string

广告宣传图片

false

-

position

int8

广告位置：1则是首页

false

-

content

string

活动内容

false

-

startTime

string

广告开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

广告结束时间

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启动

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/ad/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "link": "rio1xy",
  "url": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "position": 112,
  "content": "bfiift",
  "startTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "endTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "enabled": true,
  "weight": 243,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 114
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "jiivbe",
  "errmsg": "ghfc18",
  "data": {}

15.1.查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/admin/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

mail

string

邮箱

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

username

string

账号名称

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/admin/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=1extby&order=gobld0&mail=lavv73&mobile=520.307.8461&username=shan.batz

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

any object.

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

管理员表ID

false

-

username

string

管理员名称

false

-

password

string

false

-

lastLoginIp

string

最近一次登录IP地址

false

-

lastLoginTime

string

最近一次登录时间

false

-

openid

string

微信openid

false

-

mobile

string

用户手机号码

false

-

mail

string

管理员邮箱

false

-

gender

int8

性别：0 未知， 1男， 2 女

false

-

avatar

string

头像图片

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

false

-

array

false

string

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/admin/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "username": "shan.batz",
  "password": "ktonzr",
  "lastLoginIp": "62.169.228.195",
  "lastLoginTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "openid": "59",
  "mobile": "520.307.8461",
  "mail": "82hrk3",
  "gender": 17,
  "avatar": "pm8b5k",
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "roleIds": [
    "8ieomw"
  ],
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 718
}'

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

18.赏金管理

18.1.查询参与用户

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/reward/join

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询参与用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

taskId

string

赏金规则ID

false

-

rewardId

string

赏金参与ID

false

-

status

int16

赏金状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/reward/join?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=tf2u7d&order=plwohj&userId=59&taskId=59&rewardId=59&status=32365

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

object

any object.

}

18.4.编辑赏金规则

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/reward/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑赏金规则

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

赏金任务规则表ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

goodsPrice

number

商品价格

false

-

picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

award

number

奖励金额

false

-

joinersMember

int32

参与者数量

false

-

rewardMember

int32

活动数量

false

-

status

int16

赏金任务状态，0正常，1已完成，2已取消

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/reward/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "goodsId": "59",
  "goodsName": "shan.batz",
  "goodsPrice": 370,
  "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "award": 804,
  "joinersMember": 840,
  "rewardMember": 838,
  "status": 5043,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 347
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "3k1typ",
  "errmsg": "1yuzwf",
  "data": {}
}

  "joinersMember": 109,
  "rewardMember": 758,
  "status": 9249,

}'

20.1.查询订单

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/order/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询订单

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

orderSn

string

订单编号

false

-

brandId

string

店铺ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

showType

int32

查询类型

false

-

shipSn

string

物流单号

false

-

start

string

开始日期

false

-

end

string

截至日期

false

-

orderStatusArray

array

订单状态列表

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/order/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=z9srqm&order=owvlnt&mobile=520.307.8461&orderSn=fvbpqs&brandId=59&goodsId=59&showType=75&shipSn=9fwenu&start=2026-04-26 17:37:04&end=2026-04-26 17:37:04&orderStatusArray=29293,29293

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

any object.

21.商品评论

21.1.查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/comment/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/comment/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=m39hu7&order=lgubjn&userId=59&goodsId=59

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "tajm54",
  "errmsg": "r465ne",
  "data": {}
}

21.2.删除

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/comment/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 删除

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/comment/delete --data 'id=59'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "n35fak",
  "errmsg": "y28ua9",
  "data": {}
}

22.动态信息发布

22.1.动态列表

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/dynamic/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 动态列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

content

string

动态内容

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/dynamic/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=4ldehv&order=n3dujl&userId=59&content=hgrzxr

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "bxnxin",
  "errmsg": "9nz8ai",
  "data": {}
}

22.2.修改日常

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/dynamic/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 修改日常

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

动态表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

content

string

发表内容

false

-

picUrls

array

图片地址列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

isAdmin

boolean

是否管理员，0不是，1是

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/dynamic/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "userId": "59",
  "content": "rqfqll",
  "picUrls": [
    "1k6524"
  ],
  "likeCount": 66,
  "lookCount": 344,
  "commentCount": 504,
  "isAdmin": true,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 386
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "1q8m7n",
  "errmsg": "wlf8le",
  "data": {}
}

22.3.发布日常

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/dynamic/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 发布日常

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

动态表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

content

string

发表内容

false

-

picUrls

array

图片地址列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

isAdmin

boolean

是否管理员，0不是，1是

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/dynamic/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "userId": "59",
  "content": "t5z1lr",
  "picUrls": [
    "vrj7kv"
  ],
  "likeCount": 773,
  "lookCount": 522,
  "commentCount": 466,
  "isAdmin": true,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 556
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "emupef",
  "errmsg": "6hbssa",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/dynamic/delete

23.系统配置

23.1.查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/config/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

name

string

系统配置名

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/config/list?name=shan.batz

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "58pm18",
  "errmsg": "hcbn3k",
  "data": {}
}

23.2.配置编辑

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/config/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 配置编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

系统配置表ID

false

-

adminId

string

更新管理员ID

false

-

name

string

系统配置名

false

-

value

string

系统配置值

false

-

unit

string

系统配置值单位

false

-

depict

string

系统配置描述

false

-

objectType

string

对象类型

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/config/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "adminId": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "value": "uoe6cq",
  "unit": "37djrm",
  "depict": "zlqso3",
  "objectType": "gd5tou",
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 406
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "jjcb0e",
  "errmsg": "eqq5vf",
  "data": {}
}

Description: 列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

question

string

问题关键字

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/demo-crud/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=a39bt6&order=9kdhc4&question=puxjq5

25.订单售后

25.1.查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/aftersale/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

status

int16

售后状态

false

-

orderId

string

订单id

false

-

aftersaleSn

string

售后编号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/aftersale/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=nkdzzk&order=1o3so1&status=9427&orderId=59&aftersaleSn=bpcidh

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/aftersale/batch-reject

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 批量拒绝

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

ids

array

id列表

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/aftersale/batch-reject --data '{
  "ids": [
    "9jrpyq"
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "eq9inf",
  "errmsg": "rjr7ue",
  "data": {}
}

Author: Ysling

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

true

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

title

string

通知标题

false

-

content

string

通知内容

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/notice/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=fnvwqk&order=7j7ib2&title=2wqzct&content=ohrpys

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

data

any object.

26.2.添加

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/notice/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

通知表ID

false

-

title

string

通知标题

false

-

content

string

通知内容

false

-

adminId

string

创建通知的管理员ID，如果是系统内置通知则是0.

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/notice/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "title": "qjh107",
  "content": "hgcjzy",
  "adminId": "59",
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 194
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "z0e0tl",
  "errmsg": "oj7ubc",
  "data": {}
}

false

-

name

string

false

-

boolean

false

Author: Ysling

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

false

type

int16

优惠券类型

false

-

string

false

-

int16

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/coupon/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=ywj6jc&order=y315nh&type=28151&name=shan.batz&status=23748

29.3.详情

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/coupon/read

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/coupon/read?id=59

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "8j8q6w",
  "errmsg": "eog2jn",
  "data": {}
}

29.4.添加

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/coupon/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/coupon/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "depict": "oqom2r",
  "tag": "w4z779",
  "total": 88,
  "discount": 765,
  "min": 840,
  "limit": 7090,
  "type": 25946,
  "status": 25753,
  "goodsType": 6781,
  "goodsIds": [
    "g0epxj"
  ],
  "code": "39622",
  "timeType": 30081,
  "days": 6316,
  "startTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "endTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 63
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "81gdby",
  "errmsg": "m2o0vz",
  "data": {}
}

29.5.编辑

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/coupon/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/coupon/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "depict": "34hvqo",
  "tag": "z5077k",
  "total": 963,
  "discount": 842,
  "min": 86,
  "limit": 7617,
  "type": 11147,
  "status": 1178,
  "goodsType": 28078,
  "goodsIds": [
    "7f53yp"
  ],
  "code": "39622",
  "timeType": 25944,
  "days": 575,
  "startTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "endTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 533
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "4grszj",
  "errmsg": "jgunsu",
  "data": {}
}

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 删除

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

question

string

问题标题

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/issue/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=8g4eqs&order=1gwtkh&question=kasehp

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/role/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 角色添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

管理员token

true

-

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

角色表ID

false

-

name

string

false

-

string

false

-

boolean

是否启用

false

string

false

-

string

false

boolean

false

-

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/role/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "depict": "o5uwii",
  "enabled": true,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 69
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{

  "errmsg": "vqg8ke",
  "data": {}
}

32.5.角色编辑

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/role/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 角色编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

角色表ID

false

-

name

string

角色名称

false

-

depict

string

角色描述

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启用

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/role/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "name": "shan.batz",
  "depict": "dechog",
  "enabled": true,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 998
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

{

  "errmsg": "93jw4e",
  "data": {}
}

Type: POST

33.专题管理

33.1.专题列表

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/topic/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 专题列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

title

string

标题

false

-

subtitle

string

子标题

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/topic/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=nwacin&order=2xaltv&title=1d109s&subtitle=0ca7yh

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ywyi1p",
  "errmsg": "adc0zf",
  "data": {}
}

33.2.专题添加

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/topic/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 专题添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

专题表ID

false

-

title

string

专题标题

false

-

subtitle

string

专题子标题

false

-

author

string

专题作者

false

-

content

string

专题内容，富文本格式

false

-

price

number

专题相关商品最低价

false

-

readCount

string

专题阅读量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

picUrl

string

专题图片

false

-

goodsIds

array

专题相关商品，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/topic/create --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "title": "2qmph4",
  "subtitle": "jyetun",
  "author": "Ron Bartell",
  "content": "36h2yx",
  "price": 804,
  "readCount": "jxgfht",
  "likeCount": 344,
  "commentCount": 375,
  "picUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "goodsIds": [
    "z7cz58"
  ],
  "weight": 966,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 295
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ib092h",
  "errmsg": "xtlwcv",
  "data": {}
}

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "uuk1w2",
  "errmsg": "1645uh",
  "data": {}

35.用户管理

35.1.用户查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

mobile

string

联系电话

false

-

inviter

string

用户邀请者

false

-

level

int8

用户等级

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=nkgrde&order=3jhamv&userId=59&username=shan.batz&mobile=520.307.8461&inviter=hpqm89&level=74

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "he0w6i",
  "errmsg": "izfa09",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/detail

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/detail?id=59

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "0ory4s",
  "errmsg": "n7hx7f",
  "data": {}
}

35.3.用户编辑

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 用户编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户表ID

false

-

inviter

string

邀请者

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

password

string

用户密码

false

-

trueName

string

真实姓名

false

-

gender

int8

性别：0 未知， 1男， 2女

false

-

birthday

string

生日

false

-

shareUrl

string

个人分享图片

false

-

lastLoginTime

string

最近一次登录时间

false

-

lastLoginIp

string

最近一次登录IP地址

false

-

userLevel

int8

0 普通用户，1 VIP用户，2 高级VIP用户

false

-

integral

number

用户积分

false

-

nickName

string

用户昵称或网络名称

false

-

mobile

string

用户手机号码

false

-

avatarUrl

string

用户头像图片

false

-

openid

string

微信登录openid

false

-

sessionKey

string

微信登录会话KEY

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/update --data '{
  "id": "59",
  "inviter": "2t8tye",
  "username": "shan.batz",
  "password": "xfks83",
  "trueName": "shan.batz",
  "gender": 124,
  "birthday": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "shareUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "lastLoginTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "lastLoginIp": "62.169.228.195",
  "userLevel": 89,
  "integral": 76,
  "nickName": "earlean.larkin",
  "mobile": "520.307.8461",
  "avatarUrl": "www.avery-schuster.name",
  "openid": "59",
  "sessionKey": "j2nq55",
  "status": 89,
  "addTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",
  "version": 171
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "fki7vi",
  "errmsg": "1n0nsm",
  "data": {}
}

35.4.用户批量上传

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/upload

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

Description: 用户批量上传

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

file

file

No comments found.

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -F 'file=' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/upload

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "mi90k0",
  "errmsg": "lwj4h2",
  "data": {}
}

35.5.用户交易记录

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/deal-list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户交易记录

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

dealType

int16

交易类型

false

-

status

boolean

交易状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/user/deal-list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=2e4mj2&order=9jlxac&userId=59&dealType=9060&status=true

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "lh58kx",
  "errmsg": "0t2ju4",
  "data": {}
}

36.多租户管理

36.1.租户查询

URL: https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/tenant/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 租户查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-litemall-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

address

string

租户名称

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-litemall-Admin-Token' -i https://www.ysling.com.cn/admin/tenant/list?id=59&page=1&limit=10&sort=4xnjvg&order=b39rwz&address=6789 Nella Landing， South Jen， AK 81526

  "id": "59",
  "address": "6789 Nella Landing， South Jen， AK 81526",
  "appId": "59",
  "appSecret": "8ezmcu",

  "updateTime": "2026-04-26 17:37:04",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "59",

}'
